allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Docker" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum | ForEach-Object { [math]::Round\($_.Sum/1MB,2\) })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Docker\\wsl" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N="MB";E={[math]::Round\(\($_ | Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\Docker" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N="GB";E={[math]::Round\(\($_ | Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\ProgramData\\Docker"; Test-Path "C:\\ProgramData\\DockerDesktop"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Docker" } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\DockerDesktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N="GB";E={[math]::Round\(\($_ | Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\DockerDesktop" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 100MB } | Select-Object FullName, @{N="GB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}} | Sort-Object GB -Descending | Select-Object -First 5)
